description:
Lisa and ŇĆtani have returned to just being friends.
Though they are just friends, Lisa tries her best to keep her love inside herself protected.
The final tournament for ŇĆtani`s basketball team draws near, but the first match is impossible, as they`re facing last years champions.
When ŇĆtani immediately gives up, Lisa yells at him!
In that moment, it dawns on ŇĆtani that Lisa`s actually getting passionate for his sake.
After the match, ŇĆtani confesses that he needs Koizumi to function. 
But Lisa is asleep, snoring loudly.
It looks like these two keep missing each other in the crucial moments.
Source: crunchyroll

titles.title: Iron Fists of Love! Catch My Female Spirit Ball!!
